title: Chennai Heat Wave
lead: Chennai is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.17. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, causing concerns for residents.
body:
The current heat wave in Chennai has resulted in a score of 10.0/10, indicating a severe anomaly. 
 The temperature is expected to remain high, with a CDD of 10.1 GG, and humidity levels at 78%. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 6.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
